name: Apiary
description: Apiary — Oracle's API design and documentation platform using API Blueprint for collaborative API prototyping.

seo.title: Apiary — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Apiary: Apiary — Oracle's API design and documentation platform using API Blueprint for collaborative API prototyping.

when_to_use: API Blueprint documentation for collaborative prototyping
Mock server generation from API spec before build
Consumer-driven contract testing for REST APIs
Oracle-hosted API design workflow for enterprise teams
API style guide enforcement for large organizations

review.verdict: Once a design pioneer, now coasting under Oracle—new projects should pick OpenAPI-native tools.
review.best_for: Legacy Apiary users maintaining existing API Blueprint projects
review.not_for: Any new API effort—go OpenAPI with Stoplight, Redocly, or Postman instead

lock_in.reason: API Blueprint open, platform tied to Oracle
